commands.notes: Script compiles with no syntax errors.
Generated prompts, workpack.meta.json, and workpack.state.json from a plan with DAG data.
Second run without --force skipped existing prompt/meta/state files and emitted warnings.
Force mode overwrote existing prompt/meta/state files.

commands.cmd: python -c "import json, pathlib, jsonschema; root=pathlib.Path('workpacks'); wp=pathlib.Path('workpacks/instances/2026-01-01_feature_test-scaffold-a4verify'); meta=json.loads((wp/'workpack.meta.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); state=json.loads((wp/'workpack.state.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); meta_schema=json.loads((root/'WORKPACK_META_SCHEMA.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); state_schema=json.loads((root/'WORKPACK_STATE_SCHEMA.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); jsonschema.validate(meta, meta_schema); jsonschema.validate(state, state_schema); print('schema_validation=pass')"
commands.notes: Generated files validated against v6 meta/state schemas.

verification.regression_notes: Tooling-only change with verification on a temporary scaffold instance.

handoff.summary: Implemented a v6 scaffold tool that parses 01_plan.md, scaffolds prompts with front-matter dependencies/repos, and generates workpack.meta.json plus workpack.state.json with pending prompt status initialization.
next_steps: Run A5_integration_meta to validate end-to-end coherence across protocol docs, schemas, linter, scaffold, and adoption guide.
Optionally add unit tests for plan table parsing edge-cases in future tooling hardening.

notes: Temporary verification folder workpacks/instances/2026-01-01_feature_test-scaffold-a4verify was cleaned up after tests.
